violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The gasket on the reach in cooler by the white stove needs to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. The soap dispenser at the hand sink is empty, or not dispensing soap.
